expectations.text: Produces a 3-5 email welcome flow with a logical progression (welcome -> story/why -> best value -> social proof -> soft offer)
expectations.evidence: The response is a 5-email sequence following exactly: Email 1 Welcome, Email 2 Story/Why, Email 3 Best Value, Email 4 Social Proof, Email 5 Soft Offer.
Each email specifies timing: immediately, day 2, day 4, day 6, and day 8 respectively.

Each email has a single CTA: Email 1 asks subscribers to reply, Email 2 ends with implicit reflection, Email 3 has a '[LINK: Read/get it here]', Email 4 closes with an identity CTA, and Email 5 has '[LINK: Learn more / See if it's a fit]'.

expectations.text: May ask about the newsletter topic/audience
expectations.evidence: The response assumes a content/knowledge creator audience and notes 'adjust the tone and specifics to your brand and offer,' which is acceptable given the 'may' qualifier.
